---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(jsonlite)

# Intentar rutas en orden hasta encontrar el archivo
candidates <- c(
  file.path(getwd(), "data", "books.json"),
  "data/books.json"
)

ci <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
if (!is.null(ci) && nchar(ci) > 0) {
  candidates <- c(file.path(dirname(ci), "data", "books.json"), candidates)
}

books_path <- Find(file.exists, candidates)

if (is.null(books_path)) {
  stop(paste(
    "No se encontró books.json. Rutas buscadas:\n",
    paste(candidates, collapse = "\n "),
    "\nDirectorio de trabajo actual:", getwd()
  ))
}

books      <- read_json(books_path)
books_json <- toJSON(books, auto_unbox = TRUE)
cat(sprintf('<script>const BOOKS_DATA = %s;</script>', books_json))
```

```{=html}
<div class="lecturas-layout">

  <!-- COLUMNA IZQUIERDA -->
  <div class="glass-intro">
    <h2 class="intro-title">Lecturas</h2>
    <p class="intro-text">
      En esta sección encontrarás mis lecturas de artículos, notas, libros y otros
      tipos de textos que me parece relevante compartir.
    </p>
    <p class="intro-text">
      Cada entrada incluye una breve reseña, mi valoración personal y la referencia
      para que puedas citarlos o leerlos. Haz clic en "Leer reseña completa →".
    </p>
    <p class="intro-text">
      Las lecturas van desde literatura, metodología y bibliotecología hasta sociología
      crítica, ciencia abierta y teoría social contemporánea.
    </p>
    <div class="tag-chips-wrap" id="lecturas-tags"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- COLUMNA DERECHA -->
  <div class="lecturas-cards" id="lecturas-cards"></div>

</div>

<div class="pagination-wrap" id="lecturas-pagination"></div>

<div id="modal-container"></div>

<script>
function stars(n) {
  return '★'.repeat(n) + '☆'.repeat(5 - n);
}

function cardHtml(b) {
  return '<div class="book-card">' +
    '<div class="book-cover-side">' +
      '<img src="' + b.cover + '" alt="Portada" class="book-img">' +
      '<div class="book-stars">' + stars(b.stars) + '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="book-meta">' +
      '<span class="entry-date">Añadido: ' + b.fecha + '</span>' +
      '<span class="book-author">' + b.author + '</span>' + 
      '<div class="book-title">' + b.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="book-year">' + b.year + '</div>' +
      '<p class="book-caption">' + b.caption + '</p>' +
      '<div class="book-cite"><span class="cite-label">Cita este texto:</span> ' + b.citation + '</div>' +
      '<span class="read-hint" onclick="openModal(\'' + b.id + '\')">Ver reseña completa →</span>' +
    '</div>' +
  '</div>';
}

function modalHtml(b) {
  var paragraphs = b.review.split('\n\n').map(function(p) {
    return '<p>' + p + '</p>';
  }).join('');
  return '<div id="modal-' + b.id + '" class="modal-overlay" onclick="closeModal(event,\'' + b.id + '\')">' +
    '<div class="modal-box">' +
      '<button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal(null,\'' + b.id + '\')">&#x2715;</button>' +
      '<div class="modal-header">' +
        '<img src="' + b.cover + '" alt="" class="modal-cover">' +
        '<div class="modal-biblio">' +
          '<div class="modal-title">' + b.title + '</div>' +
          '<div class="modal-author">' + b.fullName + '</div>' +
          '<div class="modal-year">' + b.year + '</div>' +
          '<div class="modal-publisher">' + b.publisher + '</div>' +
          '<div class="modal-stars">' + stars(b.stars) + '</div>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="modal-review">' + paragraphs + '</div>' +
    '</div>' +
  '</div>';
}

document.getElementById('modal-container').innerHTML =
  BOOKS_DATA.map(modalHtml).join('');

var ITEMS_PER_PAGE = 6;
var currentBookPage = 1;
var activeBookTag = null;

(function() {
  var allTags = [];
  BOOKS_DATA.forEach(function(b) {
    if (b.tags) b.tags.forEach(function(t) {
      if (allTags.indexOf(t) === -1) allTags.push(t);
    });
  });
  allTags.sort();
  var el = document.getElementById('lecturas-tags');
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML =
    '<button class="tag-chip tag-chip--active" data-tag="" onclick="filterBooks(null)">ver todo</button>' +
    allTags.map(function(t) {
      return '<button class="tag-chip" data-tag="' + t + '" onclick="filterBooks(\'' + t + '\')">' + t + '</button>';
    }).join('');
})();

function renderBooks() {
  var data = activeBookTag
    ? BOOKS_DATA.filter(function(b) { return b.tags && b.tags.indexOf(activeBookTag) > -1; })
    : BOOKS_DATA;
  var totalPages = Math.ceil(data.length / ITEMS_PER_PAGE) || 1;
  if (currentBookPage > totalPages) currentBookPage = 1;
  var start = (currentBookPage - 1) * ITEMS_PER_PAGE;
  document.getElementById('lecturas-cards').innerHTML = data.slice(start, start + ITEMS_PER_PAGE).map(cardHtml).join('');
  renderBooksPagination(totalPages);
}

function renderBooksPagination(totalPages) {
  var el = document.getElementById('lecturas-pagination');
  if (!el) return;
  if (totalPages <= 1) { el.innerHTML = ''; return; }
  el.innerHTML = Array.from({length: totalPages}, function(_, i) {
    var p = i + 1;
    return '<button class="page-btn' + (p === currentBookPage ? ' page-btn--active' : '') +
      '" onclick="goToBookPage(' + p + ')">' + p + '</button>';
  }).join('');
}

function goToBookPage(p) {
  currentBookPage = p;
  renderBooks();
  var el = document.getElementById('lecturas-cards');
  if (el) el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function filterBooks(tag) {
  activeBookTag = tag;
  currentBookPage = 1;
  document.querySelectorAll('#lecturas-tags .tag-chip').forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.classList.toggle('tag-chip--active', btn.dataset.tag === (tag || ''));
  });
  renderBooks();
}

renderBooks();

function openModal(id) {
  document.getElementById('modal-' + id).style.display = 'flex';
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeModal(event, id) {
  var overlay = document.getElementById('modal-' + id);
  if (!event || event.target === overlay) {
    overlay.style.display = 'none';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') {
    document.querySelectorAll('.modal-overlay').forEach(function(m) {
      m.style.display = 'none';
    });
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }
});
</script>
```
